user_input: Summarize this PDF and describe the chart image.
final_answer: The PDF discusses Q3 earnings; the image shows a stock chart trending upward.
notes: Hand-crafted Anthropic attachment fixture. attachments_shape carries one PDF (document block) and one PNG (image block). Validator (commit 3) gates that to_anthropic_blocks still emits each block_kind for the trace's provider; absent that wiring, the attachment fixture would be schema-only theatre.
